scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/rbi-tiering && npm run build -w packages/crosswalk && npm run build -w packages/mrm
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/rbi-tiering && npm run test -w packages/crosswalk && npm run test -w packages/mrm
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/rbi-tiering && npm run typecheck -w packages/crosswalk && npm run typecheck -w packages/mrm
